atten3.ptxt: Check if an old gasket still remains on the pipe. If so, remove it. Also, check if any bolts or nuts are rusted. If so, replace them.

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts, 2 nuts and center exhaust pipe assembly.
Remove the gasket from the front exhaust pipe.
Remove the 4 nuts and 2 exhaust tail pipes.
Remove the 2 gaskets from the exhaust center pipe assembly.
Remove the 2 bolts, 2 nuts and exhaust center pipe assembly.
Remove the gasket from the exhaust pipe assembly.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE REAR STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and separate the rear stabilizer link assembly LH (lower side) from the rear stabilizer bar.

atten4.ptxt: If the ball joint turns together with the nut, use a hexagon wrench (5 mm) to hold the stud.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE REAR STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Separate the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR STABILIZER BAR NO. 2 BRACKET

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and rear stabilizer bar No. 2 bracket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR STABILIZER BAR NO. 1 BRACKET

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and rear stabilizer bar No. 1 bracket.
Remove the 2 rear stabilizer bushings from the rear stabilizer bar.
Support the rear axle carrier with a jack.
Remove the bolt and nut, and disconnect the strut rod (front side).

atten3.ptxt: When removing the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt, nut and strut rod from the rear axle carrier.

atten3.ptxt: When removing the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE REAR NO. 2 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt, nut and separate the rear suspension No. 2 arm (outer side) from the rear axle carrier.

atten3.ptxt: When removing the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE REAR NO. 2 SUSPENSION ARM RH

atten4.ptxt: Separate the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt, nut and the rear No. 1 suspension arm (outer side) from the rear axle carrier.

atten3.ptxt: When removing the bolt, keep the nut from rotating.

s-1.ptxt: SEPARATE REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM RH

atten4.ptxt: Separate the RH side using the same procedures as for the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SUSPENSION MEMBER LOWER STOPPER LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and the rear suspension member lower stopper LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SUSPENSION MEMBER LOWER STOPPER RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and the rear suspension member lower stopper RH.
Support the rear suspension member with a jack.
Remove the 2 bolts, and the rear suspension member sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR NO. 1 SUSPENSION ARM LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and rear No. 1 suspension arm assembly LH.
